/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 2/FNDG/CO:PLEA OPEN/PRES:06-07-04/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 26, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD//X:BEFORE  JUDGE ROSE FOR PRETRIAL,/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/
/X:WIA, NG/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/NTW/LD:02-19-04/
